case_title: GERARD BONDOC VS. BWNVT MOTORS LLC DBA SERRAMONTE FORD

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JASON LAKEY, PARTS & SERVICE DIRECTOR. FILED BY DEFENDANT BWNVT MOTORS LLC DBA SERRAMONTE FORD
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KYLE RODERICK, SERVICE ADVISOR. FILED BY DEFENDANT BWNVT MOTORS LLC DBA SERRAMONTE FORD
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BONDOC, GERARD AS TO DEFENDANT BWNVT MOTORS LLC DBA SERRAMONTE FORD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-08-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-08-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-08-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF GERARD BONDOC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BWNVT MOTORS LLC DBA SERRAMONTE FORD IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KYLE RODERICK, SERVICE ADVISOR AND JASON LAKEY, PARTS & SERVICE DIRECTOR. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT BWNVT MOTORS LLC DBA SERRAMONTE FORD WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-08-2023 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BONDOC, GERARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BWNVT MOTORS LLC DBA SERRAMONTE FORD MR. BONDOC & SERRAMONTE FORD TO SCHEDULE REPAIR UNDER WARRANTY FOR REPLACEMENT OF RECALLED PART WITHIN 45 DAYS. MR. BONDOC FAILED TO SUSTAIN BURDEN ON ALL OTHER ASSERTION RE: CLAIM FOR DAMAGE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
